framework.name: Metrics-Free Window Caused by Executive Misalignment
framework.description: Lidl's executive turnover meant key operational questions were never answered, creating a 'moving target with shifting priorities.' No stable KPIs because no stable strategy. This confirms the metrics-free window mechanism but from a governance angle rather than a timeline angle.
framework.raw_quote: Key decisions...were left unanswered. Without clear direction from the executive team, project leaders and technical teams were left to guess.

source.title: Lidl's $600 Million SAP Disaster: What Went Wrong and What Every ...
